tool_args.label: GCT expanded event venues beyond Vanderbilt Hall

payload.claim_text: Within the last two years, MTA Real Estate, in concert with MNR, expanded event venues in GCT from Vanderbilt Hall and Vanderbilt Bridge to include the Biltmore Room, the Graybar Passage, the Dining Concourse and limited use of the Main Concourse (collectively, the GCT Event Venues)
payload.subject: Grand Central Terminal event venues

payload.claim_text: Skylight's final report stated that GCT's brand and unparalleled pedestrian volume makes it a uniquely attractive asset for commercial and experiential events and activations. However, it indicated that maximum value was not captured in the current Event Fee Schedule.
payload.subject: GCT event venue valuation

tool_args.label: ERY TDR pricing at 65% of appraised fee value

payload.claim_text: MTA will apply a percentage of 65% to the final appraised value per square foot of the fee of the receiving parcel to establish the per square foot value of the ERY TDRs
payload.subject: ERY TDR pricing mechanism
